name: photo-signal
description: A quiet, camera-based gallery that plays music when you point at a printed photo.

scripts.build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production tsc -b && cross-env NODE_ENV=production vite build
scripts.test:visual:smoke: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production playwright test --grep @smoke --project "Mobile Chrome" --project "Mobile Safari"
scripts.test:visual:extended: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production playwright test --grep @extended
scripts.test:visual:full: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production playwright test
scripts.test:visual:smoke:agent: npm run build && cross-env CI=1 NODE_ENV=production PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never playwright test --grep @smoke --project "Mobile Chrome" --project "Mobile Safari"
scripts.test:visual:extended:agent: npm run build && cross-env CI=1 NODE_ENV=production PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never playwright test --grep @extended
scripts.test:visual:full:agent: npm run build && cross-env CI=1 NODE_ENV=production PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never playwright test
scripts.test:visual:update:agent: npm run build && cross-env CI=1 NODE_ENV=production PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never playwright test --update-snapshots
scripts.test:visual:update:spec:agent: npm run build && cross-env CI=1 NODE_ENV=production PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never node scripts/visual/update-snapshots-by-spec.js
scripts.test:visual:ui: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production playwright test --ui
scripts.test:visual:update: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production playwright test --update-snapshots
scripts.pre-commit: npm run lint:fix && npm run format && npm run type-check && npm run test:run && npm run build && ./scripts/check-bundle-size.sh
